title: motorloop: verified, reusable BLDC field-oriented-control HDL IP
description: Reusable, formally-verified motor-control HDL IP: a pipelined field-oriented-control datapath and the surrounding BLDC controller, packaged with per-block contracts, SymbiYosys proofs, a cycle-accurate co-simulation, AXI-Lite/AXI-Stream/Wishbone wrappers, FuseSoC/Bender/IP-XACT, an open ECP5 synthesis flow, and a RISC-V (LiteX) reference SoC.
